name_en: YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
name_cn:
YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
This denim style has been a hit at counters this year. The washed denim feels soft and comfortable, with a chubby shape like holding a marshmallow. It has a high appearance value!
Full practicality + full retro style. It looks good and matches everything. Slightly smaller than YSL 25x17x6, Model 9009
